rules.rule: comparison manifests MUST include >= 2 candidate variant_ids.
scores are reviewer-authored ONLY; ML / heuristic / similarity scoring is FORBIDDEN.
every comparison MUST capture reviewer_id and a per-variant verdict ∈ {prefer, acceptable, reject, defer}.
side-by-side metadata (display_order, group_id, comparison_dimension) MUST be deterministic and recorded.
comparison records are append-only; revisions append new comparison_id with prior_comparison_id.
